# Fulcrum

> Leverage for Discovery

Fulcrum is a public good initiative to accelerate scientific research.

We place AI engineers with research labs working on hard scientific problems, support organizations and events shaping AI-driven science, and incubate software for more automated and software-defined lab operations.

## Main Site

- Website: https://fulcrum.science/

## What Fulcrum Is Building

### Fulcrum Fellowship

AI engineers are matched with scientific labs and research teams that need technical expertise to move faster.

- URL: https://fulcrum.science/fellowship/
- Focus: embedded AI engineers for scientific labs
- Audience: AI engineers, scientists, and research labs

### Partnerships & Events

Fulcrum backs communities and programs pushing AI-driven science forward.

- URL: https://fulcrum.science/partnerships/
- Current sponsorships highlighted on the site:
  - New Science
  - Hack-Nation
  - Nucleate

### Litmus

Litmus is a related effort focused on a future where wet lab science is coordinated, automated, and software-defined.

- URL: https://litmus.science/
